idea-plugin.name: RedGreen
idea-plugin.description:
RedGreen — the IDE catches its own bugs and learns which model to trust.

When the debugger trips an exception, RedGreen races four different models in parallel. Each returns a failing test + patch. A Docker pytest runner referees: RED (bug reproduces) then GREEN (patch flips it). Winner surfaces as a gutter suggestion; Tab applies. Every episode logs to a per-codebase leaderboard so later episodes pick the right model first try. Built at the JetBrains Codex Hackathon 2026.

action.description: Send the current file + a fake exception to the RedGreen backend
